languages.text: "Техножрецы Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 готовы предоставить необходимые литании в обмен на услугу. Станция примет Вольного торговца вновь, если {mf|он|она} согласится на сделку".

"The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."
languages.original_text: "Техножрецы Алтаря-Темплум-Каликсис-Экс-17 готовы предоставить необходимые литании в обмен на услугу. Станция примет Вольного торговца вновь, если {mf|он|она} согласится на сделку".

traits.locale_text: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

"The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

"The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

languages.text: «Los tecnosacerdotes de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 están dispuestos a proporcionar las letanías necesarias a cambio de un favor. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente será bien recibid{mf|o|a} en la estación si acepta el trato».
languages.original_text: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

traits.locale_text: «Los tecnosacerdotes de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 están dispuestos a proporcionar las letanías necesarias a cambio de un favor. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente será bien recibid{mf|o|a} en la estación si acepta el trato».

languages.text: “卡利西斯祭坛17号的技术神甫们愿意提供必要的祷文，不过行商浪人需要还他们一个人情。如果{mf|他|她}接受此交易，该星站会再次接待这位行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

traits.locale_text: “卡利西斯祭坛17号的技术神甫们愿意提供必要的祷文，不过行商浪人需要还他们一个人情。如果{mf|他|她}接受此交易，该星站会再次接待这位行商浪人。”

languages.text: « Les technoprêtres d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 sont prêts à fournir les litanies nécessaires en échange d'un service. {mf|S'il|Si elle} accepte leurs conditions, la station se tient prête à recevoir {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

traits.locale_text: « Les technoprêtres d'Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 sont prêts à fournir les litanies nécessaires en échange d'un service. {mf|S'il|Si elle} accepte leurs conditions, la station se tient prête à recevoir {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: "Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin Tekno Rahipleri, bir iyilik karşılığında gerekli ilahileri sağlamaya istekliler. Anlaşmayı kabul etmesi durumunda istasyon, Hür Tacir'i tekrar kabul edecektir."
languages.original_text: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

traits.locale_text: "Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'nin Tekno Rahipleri, bir iyilik karşılığında gerekli ilahileri sağlamaya istekliler. Anlaşmayı kabul etmesi durumunda istasyon, Hür Tacir'i tekrar kabul edecektir."

languages.text: 「アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17のテク・プリーストたちは、お礼の代わりに必要なラティニウムを唱えてくれると言っています。{mf|彼は|彼女は}この取引に同意すれば、ローグ・トレーダーは再びこの駅に来るでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

traits.locale_text: 「アルター・テンプル・カリシス・エクスト17のテク・プリーストたちは、お礼の代わりに必要なラティニウムを唱えてくれると言っています。{mf|彼は|彼女は}この取引に同意すれば、ローグ・トレーダーは再びこの駅に来るでしょう。」

languages.text: "Die Techpriester von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 sind bereit, für eine Gefälligkeit die erforderlichen Litaneien bereitzustellen. Die Station wird {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} wieder empfangen, wenn {mf|er|sie} das Angebot annimmt."
languages.original_text: "The Tech-Priests of Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 are willing to provide the necessary litanies in return for a favour. The station will receive the Rogue Trader again if {mf|he|she} agrees to the deal."

traits.locale_text: "Die Techpriester von Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 sind bereit, für eine Gefälligkeit die erforderlichen Litaneien bereitzustellen. Die Station wird {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} wieder empfangen, wenn {mf|er|sie} das Angebot annimmt."
